title: Nostalgic Nutty Crunchy Quinoa Pilaf
description: A diabetic-friendly nostalgic polish dish featuring quinoa that is nutty and crunchy, perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: Bring water to a boil in a medium saucepan, add quinoa and reduce heat. Cover and simmer for about 15 minutes until water is absorbed.
Remove from heat, fluff with a fork, then let sit for 5 minutes before serving.

In a separate pan, toast walnuts and cashews on low-medium heat until golden brown, stirring frequently to prevent burning. Add cranberries and honey or sweetener if using, tossing gently until coated.
Fold in toasted nuts and dried cranberries into the quinoa pilaf, garnish with extra walnuts if desired.
